---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: harrypatria
---

## Problem Statement

What problem or friction does this feature address?
(e.g. "When I have 50+ columns, the table is hard to navigate because…")

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Example Usage

Show how you'd like to use the feature:

```python
from turbotable import TurboTable

# Proposed API (if applicable)
TurboTable("data.csv").show(frozen_columns=["id", "name"])
```

## Alternatives Considered

Have you tried any workarounds? Are there similar features in other tools?

## Priority / Impact

How important is this to your workflow?
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Significant productivity gain
- [ ] Blocking my use case

## Additional Context

Screenshots, links, or references to similar implementations.
